pr_title: SDLC-20: Fix case-insensitive origin flight search
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix flight search so the `origin` filter matches airport codes regardless of input casing. Requests like `GET /flights/search?origin=ath` will now match flights stored with origin code `ATH`.

## Changes
- Normalize the origin search parameter in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py`
- Add regression coverage for lowercase, uppercase, and mixed-case origin inputs
- Preserve existing behavior for other flight search filters and ordering

## Validation
- Added/updated tests for `search_flights`
- Verified origin searches are case-insensitive
- Confirmed no regression in other search behavior

## Notes
This is a localized service-layer fix aligned with the issue description and acceptance criteria.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
